I had Opus 4.8 in Claude Code write a sophisticated, if minor, academic paper from a archive of hundreds of de-identified research files from years ago

I had to use GPT-5.5 Pro as a reviewer, it spotted one major error & some minor points. Opus corrected https://t.co/ELpzRJuXJ5 https://t.co/9Ne955DroP
Guys, is Opus 4.8 better than 5.5? Please let me know what you think below? ⬇️

Go ahead and read the comments.

Overwhelmingly, the answer seems to be no.

I'm genuinely blown away by the state of using AI for marketing and general tasks.

When asked if he thinks AI is taking jobs in Hollywood, his response is “what jobs?”

Most other productions have been outsourced to Eastern Europe.

So 5.2x ROI trade, in 3 months. 

Thats what happens when IV increases and underlying memory assets in SK Hynix / Samsung also appreciate. https://t.co/XdE21DOyoz

Than I was back at $2B or $6B.

I also think markets missed the analyst note around potential long term supply agreements with $NVDA or $AMD. 

If they’re projecting $471M in H1 2027… https://t.co/iAzVWo8u4V

$HPS.A is close is to a 2M timeframe.

But in all reality, transformers demand visibility is very high, solid backlog, high market share (of dry).

Not exactly parabolic, but looks like a compelling compounder. https://t.co/bNGwjqfZ4M
